hatred.name: Hatred
hatred.description: Reroll failed to-hit rolls in first round of combat

fear.name: Fear
fear.description: Enemy units must pass Leadership test to charge or be charged

frenzy.name: Frenzy
frenzy.description: +1 Attack, must charge if able, immune to psychology

animosity.name: Animosity
animosity.description: Roll for animosity at start of turn

stubborn.name: Stubborn
stubborn.description: Use base Leadership for break tests

fly.name: Fly
fly.description: Can move over terrain and units
